description: #4 (codex-vetted 2026-05-30): read-only verification that l3_dump_state surfaces account-level settings + the sidebar conversation list. Maps to S39 (auto-login) / S46-S47 (auto-accept) / S57 (theme) read-half and S72 (multi-account isolation) at the state layer. Asserts the seeded echo account's known fixture state: autoLogin=true, autoAcceptFriends=false, themeMode=system, and the conversation list contains the echo peer. No mutation and no echo round-trip — the seeded conversation is already on disk. The conversation list is UI-live (hydrates shortly after login) so the scenario POLLS via state_contains before asserting presence (codex point 3).
